# Rule Trigger Matrix

**Source:** Phase 1 of `road-to-rule-hardening.md` (self-check audit) +
Phase 1 of `road-to-context-layer-maturity.md` (`load_context:` inventory).
**Generated by:** `scripts/build_rule_trigger_matrix.py` — re-run after rule
set changes. Manual classifications live in the script's `CLASSIFICATION`
table; size and context-chain columns are derived from the rule files.

## Methodology

| Column | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `type` | Frontmatter `type` (`always` / `auto`) |
| `raw` | Compressed rule size in chars (`.agent-src/rules/<name>`) |
| `ext` | Extended size under Model (b): raw + transitive `load_context` |
| `trigger` | Observable event that should activate the rule |
| `obs` | Where the trigger is observable: `hook` (platform hook), `settings` (`.agent-settings.yml` state), `agent-only` (in-head), `mechanical-already` (precedent — already enforced by a script) |
| `enforce` | Surface where the rule's effect lands: `output` / `tool-call` / `state` / `hook` / `none` |
| `hook-cost` | Engineering cost to mechanise across Augment + Claude Code: `low` (≤ 1 day, single hook script), `medium` (1–3 days, cross-platform persistence), `high` (≥ 3 days, semantic analysis or output rewrite), `NA-mechanical` (precedent — script exists), `NA-soft` (no platform mechanism plausible) |
| `tier` | Per RH roadmap: `1` mechanical · `2a` marker nudge · `2b` structured injection · `3` inherent soft · `safety-floor` (Iron-Law, never modified) · `mechanical-already` (precedent) |
| `dormant?` | Has the rule observably fired? `no` (yes, fires) · `suspected` (per RH Phase 1 explicit list) · `unknown` |

## Tier counts

- **Tier `safety-floor`** — 3 rules
- **Tier `mechanical-already`** — 9 rules
- **Tier `1`** — 6 rules
- **Tier `2a`** — 17 rules
- **Tier `2b`** — 10 rules
- **Tier `3`** — 13 rules

## Dormant-suspected (per RH Phase 1)

- `analysis-skill-routing.md` — Skill-router; no observable surface today
- `command-suggestion-policy.md` — Engine in scripts/command_suggester/ exists; live-fire signal unverified — needs telemetry pass
- `laravel-translations.md` — Path-pattern detectable but rare in this repo
- `slash-command-routing-policy.md` — Pattern-detection; live-fire signal unverified

**Action:** absence of failures ≠ healthy trigger. Each suspected-dormant
rule needs a one-session live-fire test before its Tier classification is
locked. Tracked under RH Phase 1 follow-up.

## Pilot candidates (RH Phase 3)

Per the RH roadmap pilot-selection criteria (frequency ≥ 30 %, ≥ 2 observed
failures, binary-verifiable trigger, hook-cost = `low`):

1. **`roadmap-progress-sync`** — file-edit hook on `agents/roadmaps/**`, low cost, deterministic.
2. **`onboarding-gate`** — first-turn settings check, 100 % frequency on un-onboarded projects.
3. **`context-hygiene`** — turn counter, medium cost (cross-platform persistence).

Order locked in RH Phase 3: 1 → 2 → 3 (smallest hook first).
